query:
SELECT 
  MONTH(createdAt) as mes,
  COUNT(*) as total_vendas
FROM sales
WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068' 
  AND YEAR(createdAt) = 2026 
  AND MONTH(createdAt) IN (1, 2)
GROUP BY MONTH(createdAt)
ORDER BY MONTH(createdAt);
